examples: The Trifid is a little dimmer than the Lagoon.
The Trifid Nebula itself represents the final phase of star formation.
Trifid got its name because in photographs it has three distinct lobes.
The winning team - Samson Danziger, Daniel Hu, Anthony Landau and Charlie Hu - cracked the Trifid code in 44 hours and 20 minutes.
